name: Synapse
description: Synapse — Banking-as-a-service API platform for building financial products with accounts, payments, and compliance.

seo.title: Synapse — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Synapse: Synapse — Banking-as-a-service API platform for building financial products with accounts, payments, and compliance.

when_to_use: Banking-as-a-service for building neobanks and fintech products
Account opening, ACH, and wire payments via a single API
KYC and AML compliance wrapped in banking infrastructure
Virtual debit card issuance for expense management apps
Embedded finance APIs for non-bank companies

pros: BaaS with accounts, cards, and ACH in one API
cons: Regulatory incidents caused fund freezes historically
Onboarding and underwriting can take weeks
Platform risk concentrated on sponsor bank
review.verdict: Full-stack banking APIs that move fast but carry real sponsor-bank and regulatory risk you must underwrite.
review.best_for: Fintech startups needing accounts, cards, and ACH under one compliance umbrella
review.not_for: Teams that need multi-bank redundancy or cannot tolerate BaaS concentration risk

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales — no explicit peak-lock evidence
